summary: Completed testing for feed skeleton issue fixes. Backend API tests all pass (10/10). Admin Panel flex-wrap fix verified. DailyPrompt card loads correctly with prompt text, buzz count, streak. Feed shows real records (no ghost posts) - hydration working.

minor.issue: Multiple 503 errors from external Discogs CDN images - not app bug, CDN issue

critical_code_review_comments: ✅ AdminPage.js line 51: flex flex-wrap gap-2 correctly applied - buttons wrap into multiple rows on desktop
✅ hive.py build_post_response(): Lines 337-346 correctly hydrate record_title/cover_url from records collection and return None for ghost posts (deleted records)
✅ DailyPrompt.js: SWR caching pattern with localStorage implemented for instant render on subsequent loads (lines 25-35, 82-93)
✅ DailyPrompt.js: AbortController cleanup added for React StrictMode double-mount handling (line 68 uses signal parameter)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend APIs for daily prompts all working. Admin Panel navigation buttons wrap correctly with flex-wrap. DailyPrompt card loads with SWR caching (may show skeleton for 1-3s on first load, instant on cached visits). Feed hydrates record data properly - no ghost records. Discogs images may return 503 (CDN issue, not our bug).

features_verified.feature: DailyPrompt card at top of feed
features_verified.notes: Card loads with prompt text ('a record that deserves more love than it gets'), buzz_count, streak after login. Skeleton only shows briefly on first load (SWR cache pattern)
Backend test confirms 0 ghost records in feed. build_post_response() hydrates missing record_title/cover_url from records collection and skips posts where record was deleted
All 14 nav buttons visible with flex-wrap: wrap applied. Buttons wrap into 2 rows on desktop viewport.
Correctly requires prompt_id and record_id, validates prompt exists
Feed returns posts with record_title, cover_url populated - no empty skeleton cards
Returns prompt data with buzz_count and streak as expected
